name: Lentil and Bulgur Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Finely chopped green or sweet red pepper
1/4 cup Finely chopped green onions (white part and 2 inches of green parts)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine the lentils, water, and salt. Bring to a boil over high heat, then simmer until the lentils are tender, about 20 minutes. Add more hot water if needed.
2. Stir in half a cup of butter and bulgur into the lentil mixture. Simmer for 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat and cover; set aside for 15 minutes.
3. In a heavy skillet, melt the remaining quarter cup of butter over moderate heat. Add onion and sauté until golden brown, stirring frequently.
4. Combine the sauteed onions with the lentil and bulgur mixture in a large mixing bowl. Knead the mixture gently with your hands, moistened to blend well for 2-3 minutes.
5. Add three tablespoons of finely chopped sweet pepper, green onions (white part and two inches of green parts), parsley, and mint to the mixture and mix thoroughly.
6. Adjust seasonings as needed.
7. Keeping hands moistened, form the mixture into half patties. Arrange on a serving dish. Sprinkle with reserved chopped sweet pepper, green onions, parsley, and mint. Season with paprika to taste. Serve with cucumber and tomato salad.
